title: Skar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Skar''' might refer to:

*'''[[SCr-114]]''', an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Skar (Dark Jedi)|Skar]]''', a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Skar (Sith)|Skar]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|Male]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] in the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]

{{Disambig}}
